Off Calendar Mar-05-2026 Continued To Jun-09-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees, Costs, And Expenses
Off Calendar Feb-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Angel Baker, Esq. 510-325-8771 Strategic Legal Practices for Plaintiff.
Jeanette Suarez, Esq. 213-718-0223 Gordon Rees Scully & Mansukhani for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Ms. Baker submits to the court's TR. Ms. Suarez contests and presents arguments; timeliness issue, mentions stipulation, fees incurred after April 2024. Court comments. Ms. Baker responds. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Shabnum Nisha's Motion for Attorney's Fees, Costs and Expenses.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees, Costs, And Expenses
Off Calendar Jan-22-2026 Continued To Feb-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SHABNUM NISHA's Motion For Attorneys Fees, Costs, And Expenses.

Continued on the court's own motion to be heard February 20, 2026.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
